standards.legislation_baseline: project metadata, dependencies, optional dev extras, scripts, hatchling build backend
standards.hansard_current: project metadata and dependency groups with package=false script workspace
standards.target: keep current pyproject while future package track adds build backend and CLI entry point

standards.hansard_current: committed uv.lock with frozen sync in quality gate
standards.target: continue frozen uv sync through package migration
future src/nz_hansard_corpus package with compatibility wrappers for existing scripts

standards.legislation_baseline: nzlc CLI entry point backed by Typer
standards.target: future nzhc CLI with wrappers documented before any script removal

standards.legislation_baseline: pytest test runner and pytest.ini options
standards.target: future pytest migration while unittest remains supported during transition

standards.hansard_current: ruff lint and format in local and CI quality gates
standards.target: keep ruff as canonical lint and format tool
narrow ty roots to src/tests after package migration
future pre-commit config mirroring quality gate tools without replacing CI
future Renovate config with protected publication jobs isolated from dependency PRs
keep CodeQL workflow pinned and separate from publication jobs
keep Scorecard workflow pinned and separate from publication jobs

standards.hansard_current: draft-first archive/metadata workflows and protected zenodo-production-publish workflow
standards.target: preserve protected production publish boundary through package migration

migration.script_wrapper_policy: Existing python scripts/*.py commands remain supported until replacement CLI commands exist, tests cover wrapper parity, and release docs list deprecation windows.
migration.requirements_policy: requirements.txt and requirements/dev.txt remain supported during transition; dependency authority moves to pyproject.toml and uv.lock only after CI, docs, and wrappers agree.

target_commands.replaces: python scripts/build_public_surface_audit.py and release manifest builders as applicable

ci_security.publication_job_boundary: Quality, dependency update, CodeQL, Scorecard, and Renovate jobs must not publish to Hugging Face, Zenodo, OSF, or future metadata surfaces.

publication_surfaces.engineering_constraint: Preserve current script commands and release evidence while adding package/CLI wrappers.
Preserve staged viewer layout and Xet/access checks when moving upload commands behind CLI wrappers.
Keep draft/update operations separate from protected production publish; sandbox proof evidence remains non-secret.
Keep OSF inactive unless a future optional mirror manifest records files, checksums, owner, and citation text.
Generated metadata packages remain validated artifacts and must be regenerated through package or CLI commands after migration.
